content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Pinnacle Education
Customer ID: C006
Contract ID: K009
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: 6-Month Check-in
Date: August 5, 2023
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Rachel Kim (Director of Academic Technology)

Tom Rivera: Rachel, we're six months in. How is the curriculum team finding the platform?

Rachel Kim: It's been genuinely useful. The version control on curriculum documents has solved a real problem for us — before this, we had faculty working off different versions and it caused issues during accreditation reviews. That's no longer a concern.

Tom Rivera: Really glad to hear that. Usage looks healthy from our side — 8 of 10 users are active weekly.

Rachel Kim: The two who aren't active are adjunct faculty who are only here part-time. That's not a platform issue. The core team is fully on board.

Tom Rivera: Any requests or friction points?

Rachel Kim: The notification settings could be more granular. Right now users get notified for every document change, which is overwhelming when a folder has a lot of activity. A daily digest option would help.

Tom Rivera: I'll log that. It's a reasonable ask and I'd be surprised if it's not already on the roadmap. I'll check and get back to you.

Rachel Kim: Tom, I'm going to present to our President's office in October about expanding the platform. The accreditation use case has been compelling enough that I think I can get budget for a much broader rollout — potentially the whole faculty.

Tom Rivera: That's exciting. If it would help, I can put together a usage and ROI summary you can use in that presentation.

Rachel Kim: That would be very helpful. Can you have something to me by end of September?

Tom Rivera: Absolutely.
